ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "airtel_number" TEXT /* Airtel phone number of the customer */,
  "relationship_number" TEXT /* Relationship number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of customer (individual or business) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES customer_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" INTEGER /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email, visit) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Details of the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_interaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type") REFERENCES interaction_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, customer service) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, completed, overdue) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES task_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the task status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task update */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_details" TEXT /* Details of the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task update record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task update record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_updates_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the report */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of report (e.g., customer activity, sales performance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being tracked */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics record was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the note is about */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_details" TEXT /* Details of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_notes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the attachment is related to */,
  "attachment_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was created */,
  "attachment_file" TEXT /* The attachment file itself */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_attachments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
